rules.name: record_found_School_name_Phone_Email
rules.label: record found School name, Phone, Email

rules.name: record_found_School_name_Phone_Email_BW
rules.label: record found School name, Phone, Email

Flow.description: Lead to Organization matching on various data points

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE_phone_lead
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!Incoming_Lead.Phone})), IF( LEN( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Incoming_Lead.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) = 11, MID( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Incoming_Lead.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") , 2, 10 ), TRIM( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Incoming_Lead.Phone} , "(", ""), ")", ""), " ", ""), "-", ""), "+", "") ) ), '1' )

formulas.name: SUBSTITUTE_school_name_lead
formulas.expression: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!Incoming_Lead.Company} ,"'","") ,"’","") ,"‘","") ,"/","") ,".","") ,"-","") ,",","") ,"#","") ,"&","") ,")","") ,"(","") ,")","") ,"!","") ,"[","") ,"]","") ,"\"","") ,"“","") ,"”","") ,"=","")

Flow.label: Lead to Organization matching

recordLookups.name: Find_Organization_School_name_Phone_Email
recordLookups.label: Find Organization - School name, Phone, Email

recordLookups.name: Find_Organization_School_name_Phone_Email_BW
recordLookups.label: Find Organization - School name, Phone, Email

recordUpdates.name: Connect_lead_to_BW_Org_record
recordUpdates.label: Connect lead to BW Org record
